histrix.title: Control Calidad

field.expression: (select count(*) from STKINSPEC_MOVIM where stkarticulo_id = id_stkarticulo and STKINSPEC_MOVIM.ocpnro = CPSENCAB.ocpnro and STKINSPEC_MOVIM.id_norma_inspec = STKINSPEC.id_norma_inspec limit 1)
(CASE WHEN CPSENCAB.ocpest IN (0, 4, 2) THEN CPSENCAB.ocpest ELSE (CASE WHEN CPSENCAB.ocpest IN (1, 3) and (CPSMOVIM.movcps - CPSMOVIM.pencps) < CPSMOVIM.movcps THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) END)
field.label: Estado Art.
